ingredients_text: Noodles istantanei 79% (farina di frumento, olio di palma, amido modificato, sale, agenti Lievitanti (carbonato di sodio, carbonato di potassio)), Condimento liquido 17% (salsa di soia 7,7% (acqua, semi di soia, frumento, sale), olio di semi di girasole, zucchero, salsa di soia in polvere (semi di soia, frumento, maltodestrine, sale), esaltatori di sapidità (E621, E635), aceto di sidro di mele, aromi, aglio, colorante: caramello semplice), Condimento disidratato 4% (verdure 3,3% (carota, cavolo, porro), carne di pollo 0,7%).
ingredients_text_en: instant wheat flour noodles and soy sauce, vegetable and chicken meat seasoning - ingredients: instant noodles (79%): wheat flour, palm oil, modified starch, salt, agents leavening agents: sodium carbonate, potassium carbonate, liquid seasoning (17%): soy sauce 7.6% (water, soybeans, wheat, salt), sunflower oil,  sugar, flavor enhancers: e621, e635, flavors (contain milk), apple cider vinegar powder (apple cider vinegar, maltodextrin), soy sauce powder 0.45% [soy sauce 76% (soybeans, wheat, salt) maltodextrin, salt], garlic powder, ginger, yeast extract, dehydrated seasoning (4%): vegetables 3.3% (carrots, cabbage, leek), chicken meat 0.7%,  may contain traces of celery, eggs, crustaceans, fish, mustard, sesame seeds, molluscs, 93 g and store in a cool, dry place away from light, to be consumed preferably by the end: see bottom of the package,
